members.name: AddMarker
members.signature: public void AddMarker(StringName name, float time)
members.summary: Adds a marker to this Animation.

members.name: AddTrack
members.signature: public int AddTrack(int type, int atPosition)
members.summary: Adds a track to the Animation.

members.name: AnimationTrackGetKeyAnimation
members.signature: public StringName AnimationTrackGetKeyAnimation(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Returns the animation name at the key identified by [param key_idx]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of an Animation Track.

members.name: AnimationTrackInsertKey
members.signature: public int AnimationTrackInsertKey(int trackIdx, float time, StringName animation)
members.summary: Inserts a key with value [param animation] at the given [param time] (in seconds). The [param track_idx] must be the index of an Animation Track.

members.name: AnimationTrackSetKeyAnimation
members.signature: public void AnimationTrackSetKeyAnimation(int trackIdx, int keyIdx, StringName animation)
members.summary: Sets the key identified by [param key_idx] to value [param animation]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of an Animation Track.

members.name: AudioTrackGetKeyEndOffset
members.signature: public float AudioTrackGetKeyEndOffset(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Returns the end offset of the key identified by [param key_idx]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of an Audio Track. End offset is the number of seconds cut off at the ending of the audio stream.

members.name: AudioTrackGetKeyStartOffset
members.signature: public float AudioTrackGetKeyStartOffset(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Returns the start offset of the key identified by [param key_idx]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of an Audio Track. Start offset is the number of seconds cut off at the beginning of the audio stream.

members.name: AudioTrackGetKeyStream
members.signature: public Resource AudioTrackGetKeyStream(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Returns the audio stream of the key identified by [param key_idx]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of an Audio Track.

members.name: AudioTrackInsertKey
members.signature: public int AudioTrackInsertKey(int trackIdx, float time, Resource stream, float startOffset, float endOffset)
members.summary: Inserts an Audio Track key at the given [param time] in seconds. The [param track_idx] must be the index of an Audio Track. [param stream] is the [AudioStream] resource to play. [param start_offset] is the number of seconds cut off at the beginning of the audio stream, while [param end_offset] is at the ending.

members.name: AudioTrackIsUseBlend
members.signature: public bool AudioTrackIsUseBlend(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the track at [param track_idx] will be blended with other animations.

members.name: AudioTrackSetKeyEndOffset
members.signature: public void AudioTrackSetKeyEndOffset(int trackIdx, int keyIdx, float offset)
members.summary: Sets the end offset of the key identified by [param key_idx] to value [param offset]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of an Audio Track.

members.name: AudioTrackSetKeyStartOffset
members.signature: public void AudioTrackSetKeyStartOffset(int trackIdx, int keyIdx, float offset)
members.summary: Sets the start offset of the key identified by [param key_idx] to value [param offset]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of an Audio Track.

members.name: AudioTrackSetKeyStream
members.signature: public void AudioTrackSetKeyStream(int trackIdx, int keyIdx, Resource stream)
members.summary: Sets the stream of the key identified by [param key_idx] to value [param stream]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of an Audio Track.

members.name: AudioTrackSetUseBlend
members.signature: public void AudioTrackSetUseBlend(int trackIdx, bool enable)
members.summary: Sets whether the track will be blended with other animations. If [code]true[/code], the audio playback volume changes depending on the blend value.

members.name: BezierTrackGetKeyInHandle
members.signature: public Vector2 BezierTrackGetKeyInHandle(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Returns the in handle of the key identified by [param key_idx]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of a Bezier Track.

members.name: BezierTrackGetKeyOutHandle
members.signature: public Vector2 BezierTrackGetKeyOutHandle(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Returns the out handle of the key identified by [param key_idx]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of a Bezier Track.

members.name: BezierTrackGetKeyValue
members.signature: public float BezierTrackGetKeyValue(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Returns the value of the key identified by [param key_idx]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of a Bezier Track.

members.name: BezierTrackInsertKey
members.signature: public int BezierTrackInsertKey(int trackIdx, float time, float value, Vector2 inHandle, Vector2 outHandle)
members.summary: Inserts a Bezier Track key at the given [param time] in seconds. The [param track_idx] must be the index of a Bezier Track. [param in_handle] is the left-side weight of the added Bezier curve point, [param out_handle] is the right-side one, while [param value] is the actual value at this point.

members.name: BezierTrackInterpolate
members.signature: public float BezierTrackInterpolate(int trackIdx, float time)
members.summary: Returns the interpolated value at the given [param time] (in seconds). The [param track_idx] must be the index of a Bezier Track.

members.name: BezierTrackSetKeyInHandle
members.signature: public void BezierTrackSetKeyInHandle(int trackIdx, int keyIdx, Vector2 inHandle, float balancedValueTimeRatio)
members.summary: Sets the in handle of the key identified by [param key_idx] to value [param in_handle]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of a Bezier Track.

members.name: BezierTrackSetKeyOutHandle
members.signature: public void BezierTrackSetKeyOutHandle(int trackIdx, int keyIdx, Vector2 outHandle, float balancedValueTimeRatio)
members.summary: Sets the out handle of the key identified by [param key_idx] to value [param out_handle]. The [param track_idx] must be the index of a Bezier Track.

members.name: BezierTrackSetKeyValue
members.signature: public void BezierTrackSetKeyValue(int trackIdx, int keyIdx, float value)
members.summary: Sets the value of the key identified by [param key_idx] to the given value. The [param track_idx] must be the index of a Bezier Track.

members.name: BlendShapeTrackInsertKey
members.signature: public int BlendShapeTrackInsertKey(int trackIdx, float time, float amount)
members.summary: Inserts a key in a given blend shape track. Returns the key index.

members.name: BlendShapeTrackInterpolate
members.signature: public float BlendShapeTrackInterpolate(int trackIdx, float timeSec, bool backward)
members.summary: Returns the interpolated blend shape value at the given time (in seconds). The [param track_idx] must be the index of a blend shape track.

members.name: Clear
members.signature: public void Clear()
members.summary: Clear the animation (clear all tracks and reset all).

members.name: Compress
members.signature: public void Compress(int pageSize, int fps, float splitTolerance)
members.summary: Compress the animation and all its tracks in-place. This will make [method track_is_compressed] return [code]true[/code] once called on this [Animation]. Compressed tracks require less memory to be played, and are designed to be used for complex 3D animations (such as cutscenes) imported from external 3D software. Compression is lossy, but the difference is usually not noticeable in real world conditions. [b]Note:[/b] Compressed tracks have various limitations (such as not being editable from the editor), so only use compressed animations if you actually need them.

members.name: CopyTrack
members.signature: public void CopyTrack(int trackIdx, Animation toAnimation)
members.summary: Adds a new track to [param to_animation] that is a copy of the given track from this animation.

members.name: FindTrack
members.signature: public int FindTrack(NodePath path, int type)
members.summary: Returns the index of the specified track. If the track is not found, return -1.

members.name: GetMarkerAtTime
members.signature: public StringName GetMarkerAtTime(float time)
members.summary: Returns the name of the marker located at the given time.

members.name: GetMarkerColor
members.signature: public Color GetMarkerColor(StringName name)
members.summary: Returns the given marker's color.

members.name: GetMarkerNames
members.signature: public PackedStringArray GetMarkerNames()
members.summary: Returns every marker in this Animation, sorted ascending by time.

members.name: GetMarkerTime
members.signature: public float GetMarkerTime(StringName name)
members.summary: Returns the given marker's time.

members.name: GetNextMarker
members.signature: public StringName GetNextMarker(float time)
members.summary: Returns the closest marker that comes after the given time. If no such marker exists, an empty string is returned.

members.name: GetPrevMarker
members.signature: public StringName GetPrevMarker(float time)
members.summary: Returns the closest marker that comes before the given time. If no such marker exists, an empty string is returned.

members.name: GetTrackCount
members.signature: public int GetTrackCount()
members.summary: Returns the amount of tracks in the animation.

members.name: HasMarker
members.signature: public bool HasMarker(StringName name)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this Animation contains a marker with the given name.

members.name: MethodTrackGetName
members.signature: public StringName MethodTrackGetName(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Returns the method name of a method track.

members.name: MethodTrackGetParams
members.signature: public Array MethodTrackGetParams(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Returns the arguments values to be called on a method track for a given key in a given track.

members.name: Optimize
members.signature: public void Optimize(float allowedVelocityErr, float allowedAngularErr, int precision)
members.summary: Optimize the animation and all its tracks in-place. This will preserve only as many keys as are necessary to keep the animation within the specified bounds.

members.name: PositionTrackInsertKey
members.signature: public int PositionTrackInsertKey(int trackIdx, float time, Vector3 position)
members.summary: Inserts a key in a given 3D position track. Returns the key index.

members.name: PositionTrackInterpolate
members.signature: public Vector3 PositionTrackInterpolate(int trackIdx, float timeSec, bool backward)
members.summary: Returns the interpolated position value at the given time (in seconds). The [param track_idx] must be the index of a 3D position track.

members.name: RemoveMarker
members.signature: public void RemoveMarker(StringName name)
members.summary: Removes the marker with the given name from this Animation.

members.name: RemoveTrack
members.signature: public void RemoveTrack(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Removes a track by specifying the track index.

members.name: RotationTrackInsertKey
members.signature: public int RotationTrackInsertKey(int trackIdx, float time, Quaternion rotation)
members.summary: Inserts a key in a given 3D rotation track. Returns the key index.

members.name: RotationTrackInterpolate
members.signature: public Quaternion RotationTrackInterpolate(int trackIdx, float timeSec, bool backward)
members.summary: Returns the interpolated rotation value at the given time (in seconds). The [param track_idx] must be the index of a 3D rotation track.

members.name: ScaleTrackInsertKey
members.signature: public int ScaleTrackInsertKey(int trackIdx, float time, Vector3 scale)
members.summary: Inserts a key in a given 3D scale track. Returns the key index.

members.name: ScaleTrackInterpolate
members.signature: public Vector3 ScaleTrackInterpolate(int trackIdx, float timeSec, bool backward)
members.summary: Returns the interpolated scale value at the given time (in seconds). The [param track_idx] must be the index of a 3D scale track.

members.name: SetMarkerColor
members.signature: public void SetMarkerColor(StringName name, Color color)
members.summary: Sets the given marker's color.

members.name: TrackFindKey
members.signature: public int TrackFindKey(int trackIdx, float time, int findMode, bool limit, bool backward)
members.summary: Finds the key index by time in a given track. Optionally, only find it if the approx/exact time is given. If [param limit] is [code]true[/code], it does not return keys outside the animation range. If [param backward] is [code]true[/code], the direction is reversed in methods that rely on one directional processing. For example, in case [param find_mode] is [constant FIND_MODE_NEAREST], if there is no key in the current position just after seeked, the first key found is retrieved by searching before the position, but if [param backward] is [code]true[/code], the first key found is retrieved after the position.

members.name: TrackGetInterpolationLoopWrap
members.signature: public bool TrackGetInterpolationLoopWrap(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the track at [param track_idx] wraps the interpolation loop. New tracks wrap the interpolation loop by default.

members.name: TrackGetInterpolationType
members.signature: public int TrackGetInterpolationType(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Returns the interpolation type of a given track.

members.name: TrackGetKeyCount
members.signature: public int TrackGetKeyCount(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Returns the number of keys in a given track.

members.name: TrackGetKeyTime
members.signature: public float TrackGetKeyTime(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Returns the time at which the key is located.

members.name: TrackGetKeyTransition
members.signature: public float TrackGetKeyTransition(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Returns the transition curve (easing) for a specific key (see the built-in math function [method @GlobalScope.ease]).

members.name: TrackGetKeyValue
members.signature: public Variant TrackGetKeyValue(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Returns the value of a given key in a given track.

members.name: TrackGetPath
members.signature: public NodePath TrackGetPath(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Gets the path of a track. For more information on the path format, see [method track_set_path].

members.name: TrackGetType
members.signature: public int TrackGetType(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Gets the type of a track.

members.name: TrackInsertKey
members.signature: public int TrackInsertKey(int trackIdx, float time, Variant key, float transition)
members.summary: Inserts a generic key in a given track. Returns the key index.

members.name: TrackIsCompressed
members.signature: public bool TrackIsCompressed(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the track is compressed, [code]false[/code] otherwise. See also [method compress].

members.name: TrackIsEnabled
members.signature: public bool TrackIsEnabled(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the track at index [param track_idx] is enabled.

members.name: TrackIsImported
members.signature: public bool TrackIsImported(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given track is imported. Else, return [code]false[/code].

members.name: TrackMoveDown
members.signature: public void TrackMoveDown(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Moves a track down.

members.name: TrackMoveTo
members.signature: public void TrackMoveTo(int trackIdx, int toIdx)
members.summary: Changes the index position of track [param track_idx] to the one defined in [param to_idx].

members.name: TrackMoveUp
members.signature: public void TrackMoveUp(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Moves a track up.

members.name: TrackRemoveKey
members.signature: public void TrackRemoveKey(int trackIdx, int keyIdx)
members.summary: Removes a key by index in a given track.

members.name: TrackRemoveKeyAtTime
members.signature: public void TrackRemoveKeyAtTime(int trackIdx, float time)
members.summary: Removes a key at [param time] in a given track.

members.name: TrackSetEnabled
members.signature: public void TrackSetEnabled(int trackIdx, bool enabled)
members.summary: Enables/disables the given track. Tracks are enabled by default.

members.name: TrackSetImported
members.signature: public void TrackSetImported(int trackIdx, bool imported)
members.summary: Sets the given track as imported or not.

members.name: TrackSetInterpolationLoopWrap
members.signature: public void TrackSetInterpolationLoopWrap(int trackIdx, bool interpolation)
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the track at [param track_idx] wraps the interpolation loop.

members.name: TrackSetInterpolationType
members.signature: public void TrackSetInterpolationType(int trackIdx, int interpolation)
members.summary: Sets the interpolation type of a given track.

members.name: TrackSetKeyTime
members.signature: public void TrackSetKeyTime(int trackIdx, int keyIdx, float time)
members.summary: Sets the time of an existing key.

members.name: TrackSetKeyTransition
members.signature: public void TrackSetKeyTransition(int trackIdx, int keyIdx, float transition)
members.summary: Sets the transition curve (easing) for a specific key (see the built-in math function [method @GlobalScope.ease]).

members.name: TrackSetKeyValue
members.signature: public void TrackSetKeyValue(int trackIdx, int key, Variant value)
members.summary: Sets the value of an existing key.

members.name: TrackSetPath
members.signature: public void TrackSetPath(int trackIdx, NodePath path)
members.summary: Sets the path of a track. Paths must be valid scene-tree paths to a node and must be specified starting from the [member AnimationMixer.root_node] that will reproduce the animation. Tracks that control properties or bones must append their name after the path, separated by [code]":"[/code]. For example, [code]"character/skeleton:ankle"[/code] or [code]"character/mesh:transform/local"[/code].

members.name: TrackSwap
members.signature: public void TrackSwap(int trackIdx, int withIdx)
members.summary: Swaps the track [param track_idx]'s index position with the track [param with_idx].

members.name: ValueTrackGetUpdateMode
members.signature: public int ValueTrackGetUpdateMode(int trackIdx)
members.summary: Returns the update mode of a value track.

members.name: ValueTrackInterpolate
members.signature: public Variant ValueTrackInterpolate(int trackIdx, float timeSec, bool backward)
members.summary: Returns the interpolated value at the given time (in seconds). The [param track_idx] must be the index of a value track. A [param backward] mainly affects the direction of key retrieval of the track with [constant UPDATE_DISCRETE] converted by [constant AnimationMixer.ANIMATION_CALLBACK_MODE_DISCRETE_FORCE_CONTINUOUS] to match the result with [method track_find_key].

members.name: ValueTrackSetUpdateMode
members.signature: public void ValueTrackSetUpdateMode(int trackIdx, int mode)
members.summary: Sets the update mode of a value track.

members.name: CaptureIncluded
members.signature: public bool CaptureIncluded { get; set; }
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the capture track is included. This is a cached readonly value for performance.

members.name: Length
members.signature: public float Length { get; set; }
members.summary: The total length of the animation (in seconds). [b]Note:[/b] Length is not delimited by the last key, as this one may be before or after the end to ensure correct interpolation and looping.

members.name: LoopMode
members.signature: public int LoopMode { get; set; }
members.summary: Determines the behavior of both ends of the animation timeline during animation playback. This indicates whether and how the animation should be restarted, and is also used to correctly interpolate animation cycles.

members.name: Step
members.signature: public float Step { get; set; }
members.summary: The animation step value.

values.name: FIND_MODE_APPROX
values.summary: Finds only the key with approximating the time.

values.name: FIND_MODE_EXACT
values.summary: Finds only the key with matching the time.

values.name: FIND_MODE_NEAREST
values.summary: Finds the nearest time key.

values.name: INTERPOLATION_CUBIC
values.summary: Cubic interpolation. This looks smoother than linear interpolation, but is more expensive to interpolate. Stick to [constant INTERPOLATION_LINEAR] for complex 3D animations imported from external software, even if it requires using a higher animation framerate in return.

values.name: INTERPOLATION_CUBIC_ANGLE
values.summary: Cubic interpolation with shortest path rotation. [b]Note:[/b] The result value is always normalized and may not match the key value.

values.name: INTERPOLATION_LINEAR
values.summary: Linear interpolation.

values.name: INTERPOLATION_LINEAR_ANGLE
values.summary: Linear interpolation with shortest path rotation. [b]Note:[/b] The result value is always normalized and may not match the key value.

values.name: INTERPOLATION_NEAREST
values.summary: No interpolation (nearest value).

values.name: LOOP_LINEAR
values.summary: At both ends of the animation, the animation will be repeated without changing the playback direction.

values.name: LOOP_NONE
values.summary: At both ends of the animation, the animation will stop playing.

values.name: LOOP_PINGPONG
values.summary: Repeats playback and reverse playback at both ends of the animation.

values.name: LOOPED_FLAG_END
values.summary: This flag indicates that the animation has reached the end of the animation and just after loop processed.

values.name: LOOPED_FLAG_NONE
values.summary: This flag indicates that the animation proceeds without any looping.

values.name: LOOPED_FLAG_START
values.summary: This flag indicates that the animation has reached the start of the animation and just after loop processed.

values.name: TYPE_ANIMATION
values.summary: Animation tracks play animations in other [AnimationPlayer] nodes.

values.name: TYPE_AUDIO
values.summary: Audio tracks are used to play an audio stream with either type of [AudioStreamPlayer]. The stream can be trimmed and previewed in the animation.

values.name: TYPE_BEZIER
values.summary: Bezier tracks are used to interpolate a value using custom curves. They can also be used to animate sub-properties of vectors and colors (e.g. alpha value of a [Color]).

values.name: TYPE_BLEND_SHAPE
values.summary: Blend shape track.

values.name: TYPE_METHOD
values.summary: Method tracks call functions with given arguments per key.

values.name: TYPE_POSITION_3D
values.summary: 3D position track (values are stored in [Vector3]s).

values.name: TYPE_ROTATION_3D
values.summary: 3D rotation track (values are stored in [Quaternion]s).

values.name: TYPE_SCALE_3D
values.summary: 3D scale track (values are stored in [Vector3]s).

values.name: TYPE_VALUE
values.summary: Value tracks set values in node properties, but only those which can be interpolated. For 3D position/rotation/scale, using the dedicated [constant TYPE_POSITION_3D], [constant TYPE_ROTATION_3D] and [constant TYPE_SCALE_3D] track types instead of [constant TYPE_VALUE] is recommended for performance reasons.

values.name: UPDATE_CAPTURE
values.summary: Same as [constant UPDATE_CONTINUOUS] but works as a flag to capture the value of the current object and perform interpolation in some methods. See also [method AnimationMixer.capture], [member AnimationPlayer.playback_auto_capture], and [method AnimationPlayer.play_with_capture].

values.name: UPDATE_CONTINUOUS
values.summary: Update between keyframes and hold the value.

values.name: UPDATE_DISCRETE
values.summary: Update at the keyframes.

constants.name: TYPE_VALUE
constants.summary: Value tracks set values in node properties, but only those which can be interpolated. For 3D position/rotation/scale, using the dedicated [constant TYPE_POSITION_3D], [constant TYPE_ROTATION_3D] and [constant TYPE_SCALE_3D] track types instead of [constant TYPE_VALUE] is recommended for performance reasons.

constants.name: TYPE_POSITION_3D
constants.summary: 3D position track (values are stored in [Vector3]s).

constants.name: TYPE_ROTATION_3D
constants.summary: 3D rotation track (values are stored in [Quaternion]s).

constants.name: TYPE_SCALE_3D
constants.summary: 3D scale track (values are stored in [Vector3]s).

constants.name: TYPE_BLEND_SHAPE
constants.summary: Blend shape track.

constants.name: TYPE_METHOD
constants.summary: Method tracks call functions with given arguments per key.

constants.name: TYPE_BEZIER
constants.summary: Bezier tracks are used to interpolate a value using custom curves. They can also be used to animate sub-properties of vectors and colors (e.g. alpha value of a [Color]).

constants.name: TYPE_AUDIO
constants.summary: Audio tracks are used to play an audio stream with either type of [AudioStreamPlayer]. The stream can be trimmed and previewed in the animation.

constants.name: TYPE_ANIMATION
constants.summary: Animation tracks play animations in other [AnimationPlayer] nodes.

constants.name: INTERPOLATION_NEAREST
constants.summary: No interpolation (nearest value).

constants.name: INTERPOLATION_LINEAR
constants.summary: Linear interpolation.

constants.name: INTERPOLATION_CUBIC
constants.summary: Cubic interpolation. This looks smoother than linear interpolation, but is more expensive to interpolate. Stick to [constant INTERPOLATION_LINEAR] for complex 3D animations imported from external software, even if it requires using a higher animation framerate in return.

constants.name: INTERPOLATION_LINEAR_ANGLE
constants.summary: Linear interpolation with shortest path rotation. [b]Note:[/b] The result value is always normalized and may not match the key value.

constants.name: INTERPOLATION_CUBIC_ANGLE
constants.summary: Cubic interpolation with shortest path rotation. [b]Note:[/b] The result value is always normalized and may not match the key value.

constants.name: UPDATE_CONTINUOUS
constants.summary: Update between keyframes and hold the value.

constants.name: UPDATE_DISCRETE
constants.summary: Update at the keyframes.

constants.name: UPDATE_CAPTURE
constants.summary: Same as [constant UPDATE_CONTINUOUS] but works as a flag to capture the value of the current object and perform interpolation in some methods. See also [method AnimationMixer.capture], [member AnimationPlayer.playback_auto_capture], and [method AnimationPlayer.play_with_capture].

constants.name: LOOP_NONE
constants.summary: At both ends of the animation, the animation will stop playing.

constants.name: LOOP_LINEAR
constants.summary: At both ends of the animation, the animation will be repeated without changing the playback direction.

constants.name: LOOP_PINGPONG
constants.summary: Repeats playback and reverse playback at both ends of the animation.

constants.name: LOOPED_FLAG_NONE
constants.summary: This flag indicates that the animation proceeds without any looping.

constants.name: LOOPED_FLAG_END
constants.summary: This flag indicates that the animation has reached the end of the animation and just after loop processed.

constants.name: LOOPED_FLAG_START
constants.summary: This flag indicates that the animation has reached the start of the animation and just after loop processed.

constants.name: FIND_MODE_NEAREST
constants.summary: Finds the nearest time key.

constants.name: FIND_MODE_APPROX
constants.summary: Finds only the key with approximating the time.

constants.name: FIND_MODE_EXACT
constants.summary: Finds only the key with matching the time.
